title: Snow Accumulation
description: A winter surface system with camera-wrapped instanced snowfall, shared wind and time, world-space snow coverage, single-source snow height and normals, model snow capping, matte snow roughness, ice-crystal sparkle, and an optional shared-field frozen lake.
backend: WebGL2 / GLSL material injection and instancing
techniques: world-space FBM snow mask and drift height
shared lake basin and translucent ice field
